changeSet.author: openelis-admin-access

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = (SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab')

changeSet.comment: Create Traditional Medicine lab unit using TestSection ID

column.name: lab_unit
column.valueComputed: (SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab')

changeSet.author: openelis-admin-access

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = (SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name IN ('TMMRD Lab Technician', 'TMMRD Researcher', 'TMMRD Pharmacognosist', 'TMMRD Lab Manager', 'TMMRD Principal Investigator')

changeSet.comment: Assign all TMMRD roles to Traditional Medicine lab unit

column.name: lab_unit_role_map_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT lab_unit_role_map_id FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = (SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab'))

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'TMMRD Lab Technician')

column.name: lab_unit_role_map_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT lab_unit_role_map_id FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = (SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab'))

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'TMMRD Researcher')

column.name: lab_unit_role_map_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT lab_unit_role_map_id FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = (SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab'))

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'TMMRD Pharmacognosist')

column.name: lab_unit_role_map_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT lab_unit_role_map_id FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = (SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab'))

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'TMMRD Lab Manager')

column.name: lab_unit_role_map_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT lab_unit_role_map_id FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = (SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab'))

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'TMMRD Principal Investigator')
